institution.name: UPMC Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh
aliases: UPMC Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh — Medical Student Education Program

searchTermsTried: UPMC Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh visiting medical student VSLO international Pitt pediatrics elective
searchProcess.robotsOrAccessNotes: chp.edu and Pitt SOM accessible; CHP routes both domestic and international visiting students through VSLO + Pitt Global Health Dean review.

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Medical Student Education and Training | Children's Hospital
candidateFindings.shortQuote: Visiting domestic and international students must apply for an elective rotation through the AAMC Visiting Student Learning Opportunities (VSLO) program.
candidateFindings.durationDecision: 4-week per rotation per Pitt SOM policy

negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: Pediatric-only specialty restriction (CHP is a pediatric hospital); MS4-only year restriction inherited from Pitt SOM.

nextAction: For public-safe activation: (a) INSTITUTION_SPECIFIC — CHP is a pediatric AMC; (b) VSLO required for both domestic + international; (c) international lane goes through Pitt SOM Global Health Dean review with $4,500/elective tuition; (d) MS4 only; (e) PA background clearance required.
plainEnglishSummary: UPMC Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh accepts visiting fourth-year medical students through VSLO. Both domestic and international students can apply. International students follow Pitt SOM's Global Health Dean review process ($4,500/elective tuition) with required PA background clearance. Pediatric-focused multispecialty.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because PA gained a second P101 packet (after UPMC Presbyterian); pediatric AMC sibling expansion documented.
